data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. HE'S REGAL ran below best last time finishing sixth (26.26) over 457m at Q Lakeside from Box 6. Is yet to miss the placings from this draw, including four wins, from eight starts. Can discover winning form. 7. MEMORY OF MUM last raced on February 5 when fifth (35.20) over 600m at Q Parklands in a Grade 4/5. Form here sound including four wins. Meets a moderate line up and should run well. 8. HIGHWAY PRINCESS is an honest type rarely out of the money, scoring at Q Lakeside (35.98) last time and making it two straight wins. Rates a winning chance on best. 2. CASH ON DEMAND cannot be written off despite a miss here at his latest outing.","runners":[1,7,8,2],"exclusive":false}
